changes.title: Auto-share toggle now enables correctly
changes.description: Fixed issue where granting 'Always' location permission didn't enable auto-share

changes.title: QR exchange 'I show first' flow
changes.description: Fixed scanning not completing when using 'I show first' workflow

changes.title: Instant location sharing on friend add
changes.description: Adding a friend now shares your location immediately if auto-share is enabled

changes.title: Automatic location fetch after adding friend
changes.description: Friend locations are now fetched automatically after completing the add friend flow

changes.title: Tappable map markers
changes.description: Tap a friend's marker on the map to select them, center the view, and show their details

changes.title: QR exchange defaults to 'I show first'
changes.description: iOS now defaults to showing your QR code first, complementing Android's scan-first default

changes.title: Share link option on QR exchange screens
changes.description: Added 'Share Link Instead' button when showing your QR code for easier remote sharing

changes.title: Add with link option on scan screen
changes.description: Can now paste a friend link instead of scanning QR code, matching iOS functionality

changes.title: Prevent accidental dismissal during QR exchange
changes.description: Cannot swipe to dismiss the add friend sheet after starting the second step

changes.title: Skip unnecessary location upload on launch
changes.description: App no longer attempts to upload location on launch when there are no share recipients

changes.title: Remove redundant location button
changes.description: Removed the map location button since the profile icon already centers on your location

changes.title: Prevent uploading stale cached locations
changes.description: App now skips uploading locations older than what was last successfully sent

changes.title: Periodic foreground location sharing
changes.description: When auto-share is enabled, location is now shared every minute while the app is in the foreground

changes.title: Standardized location freshness handling
changes.description: All upload paths now use consistent logic: explicit actions request fresh GPS, background tasks use cached if recent

changes.title: Configurable location settings
changes.description: Advanced location settings page lets users adjust GPS timeout, accuracy thresholds, and test GPS acquisition

changes.title: Validate public key length in friend links
changes.description: Friend links now validate that the public key is exactly 32 bytes, rejecting malformed links earlier

changes.title: Prevent uploading stale cached locations
changes.description: Core now tracks the last uploaded location timestamp and rejects uploads of older locations

changes.title: Friend count obfuscation via padding
changes.description: Entry count is padded to buckets (power of 2 up to 64, then nearest 50) to hide exact friend count from server.

changes.title: Blob format version byte
changes.description: Added version byte (0x02) prefix for future format compatibility. Breaking change: old blobs will not decrypt.
